snippets.takeaway: One of our most requested features, longer Vercel function runtime, is here. What looks like an innocent tweak of a constant… is actually the conclusion a multi-year compute...
snippets.summary: Guillermo Rauch (rauchg on X) shared 3 recent updates. One of our most requested features, longer Vercel function runtime, is here. What looks like an innocent tweak of a constant… is actually the conclusion a multi-year compute platform investment. Builds, Sandbox, and now Functions run on our homegrown microVM-based Fluid compute infrastructure.

snippets.title: Aaron Levie on agents and enterprise
snippets.takeaway: Open source going to win big Key post that gives a bit of insight into what the future of AI could look like.
snippets.summary: Aaron Levie (levie on X) shared 3 recent updates. Open source going to win big Key post that gives a bit of insight into what the future of AI could look like. “The most interesting thing happening in AI isn't that one model is getting smarter. It's that intelligence is becoming increasingly customizable. The companies that win won't necessarily be the ones with the biggest models. They'll be the ones that turn intelligence into something uniquely their own.

snippets.title: Nikunj Kothari on enterprise and tools
snippets.takeaway: I now know 32 VCs who have moved back to operating in the last 12 months.. everyone from associates to GPs.
snippets.summary: Nikunj Kothari (nikunj on X) shared 1 recent update. I now know 32 VCs who have moved back to operating in the last 12 months.. everyone from associates to GPs. Maybe it’s this way all the time and I’m just noticing it, but the pace seems to be accelerating. And they seem much much happier? From a professional perspective, it makes sense especially if you are junior. You get to work directly with customers and work as a team.

snippets.title: New in Claude Managed Agents: dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration
snippets.takeaway: New in Claude Managed Agents: dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration. Today we're launching dreaming in Claude Managed Agents as a research preview.
snippets.summary: New in Claude Managed Agents: dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration. Today we're launching dreaming in Claude Managed Agents as a research preview. Dreaming extends memory by reviewing past sessions to find patterns and help agents self-improve. We're also making outcomes, multiagent orchestration, and webhooks available to developers building with Managed Agents.

snippets.sourceName: The MAD Podcast with Matt Turck
snippets.title: OpenAI's Dan Roberts: Why AI Can Now Make Discoveries
snippets.takeaway: OpenAI's Dan Roberts: Why AI Can Now Make Discoveries. This viral analysis from earlier this year, February, I think, that claims that Aurel produces less than one bit of useful...
snippets.summary: This viral analysis from earlier this year, February, I think, that claims that Aurel produces less than one bit of useful information per 10,000 tokens, and then Carpathi called it sucking supervisions through a straw. I also had a startup along the way, and spent some time at Sequoia Capital as an entrepreneur in residence. I feel really excited that we will get to really answer a lot of fundamental questions in the field of science that that we care about with the aid or the models being the driving force.
entities: The MAD Podcast with Matt Turck
